recommendations.description: Add independent discovery for list_projects, then chain batch_get_projects with for_each and params. batch_get_projects requires 'names' parameter (list of project names) which must come from list_projects.
recommendations.impact: Fixes parameter validation errors, enables proper discovery chain

recommendations.description: Add items_for to emit sections for batch_get_projects discovery. API returns projects[] array, need items_for to iterate properly.
recommendations.impact: Enables proper iteration over projects list

recommendations.description: Fix exists operator usage - should use value null, not 'true'. exists operator checks for presence, not value equality.
Remove 'projects.' wrapper from field paths. After items_for, fields are directly on item, not item.projects.
Fix date comparison - '90 days ago' is not valid format. Need proper date calculation or timestamp comparison.

validation_issues: All 8 rules have missing discovery chain - batch_get_projects requires names parameter
All 8 rules missing items_for - need to iterate over projects[] array
2 rules have wrong operator/value combination (exists with 'true')
1 rule has wrong field paths (item.projects.* should be item.*)
1 rule has invalid date format ('90 days ago')

api_structure.list_projects: Returns projects[] (list of project names) - independent, no params needed
api_structure.batch_get_projects: Returns projects[] (list of project objects) - requires names[] parameter
api_structure.discovery_pattern: Must use list_projects first to get names, then batch_get_projects with those names

issues: All discoveries missing required parameters (names for batch_get_projects)
All discoveries missing items_for for list iteration
2 rules have wrong operator/value (exists with 'true')
1 rule has wrong field paths (item.projects.*)
1 rule has invalid date format

warnings: batch_get_projects: Missing required parameter names (5 occurrences, one per account)
